name: Guangzhou
author: Kronifer
description:
广州 (Guangzhou)

CAN · v1.0.0

Detailed map of the prefecture-level city of 广州 (Guangzhou) based off data from the 2023 5th National Economic Census.

Coverage

Playable Area: 5,089 km²

Population Summary

Total Population: 18,676,605

Modeled Demand: 11,004,021

Map Statistics

Buildings Indexed: 2,668,866

Demand Points: 12,242

Populations109,073

Mean Point Size: 898.87

Median Point Size: 191

Mean Pop Size: 100.87

Median Pop Size: 97

Special Demand

Airport

  • Guangzhou Baiyun International Airport (CAN): 104,109 daily arrivals/departures modeled

Universities

  • Sun Yat-Sen University: 56,047 students modeled

  • South China University of Technology (SCUT): 45,357 students modeled

  • Jinan University: 50,000 students modeled

Additional Features

  • Building Collision — A buildings index is included for all non-filtered buildings, assigning each a flat foundation depth of −10 m in-game. This provides underground collision geometry so that tunnels interact correctly with building footprints.

  • Neighborhood Labels — Three layers of place name labels are embedded in the map:

    • City labels — Prefecture-Level Cities, Counties, County-Level Cities

    • Municipality labels — Districts

    • Neighborhood labels — Subdistricts, Towns, Townships

Methodology

This map was created using a multi-step methodology, sourcing data from all 11 Districts of Guangzhou.

Data Collection

5th Economic Census data was fetched from each individual District of Guangzhou. Specifically, Communique/Bulletin no. 7, focusing on employees per subdistrict was obtained.

Spatial Assignment

Population and Employee data for each subdistrict based on the above bulletins were assigned to the geometry of each subdistrict using a Shapefile.

Geographical Processing - Stage 1

Data was disaggregated to the individual building level by assigning a building a usage metric based off of total commercial/residential volume within a Subdistrict.

Geographical Processing - Stage 2

Data was aggregated up to a hexagonal grid with side length n=400m for commute modelling.

Commute Modelling

O/D pairs were created using a Gravity Model, the source for which can be found in the sources linked below.

Map Data

Map Data was fetched from OpenStreetMap, Overture, and 3D-GloBFP and processed by RSlurry's depot package.

Sources

All data used in the creation of this map was obtained from freely available sources.

  • Depot (RSlurry): GitHub

  • 3D-GloBFP: Zenodo

  • Overture Maps

  • OpenStreetMap

  • Gravity Model (Kronifer): GitHub
